summary: Completed comprehensive pre-launch testing of SEO Automation SaaS application. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows tested successfully - Landing page, Login, Register, Dashboard, Admin Dashboard (all 5 tabs), Billing, API Keys, Pricing, and Footer pages (Contact, Terms, Privacy).
passed_tests: Landing page - Autentificare button visible and clickable
Landing page - Începe Gratuit button visible and clickable
Landing page - Hero CTA button visible
Landing page - Plan cards (Starter, Pro, Agency) displayed
Landing page - Footer links (Terms, Privacy, Contact) present
Login page - Email/Password inputs and Submit button present
Login flow - Admin login successful with redirect to dashboard
Register page - Name, Email, Password inputs present
Dashboard - Loads correctly after login
Admin Dashboard - Stats tab shows all metrics (users, subscriptions, revenue, etc.)
Admin Dashboard - Users tab shows user list
Admin Dashboard - Notifications tab working
Admin Dashboard - Content tab working
Admin Dashboard - Platform Settings tab working
Billing page - Shows current plan (Enterprise) and usage stats
API Keys page - BYOAK management interface working
Pricing page - All 4 plans displayed (€19, €49, €99, €199)
Contact page - Form and contact info displayed
Terms page - Legal content displayed
Privacy page - Privacy policy displayed
Backend: Auth login/register/forgot-password endpoints
Backend: Admin stats, users, notifications, content, platform-settings
Backend: Subscription, usage, invoices endpoints
Backend: API keys status endpoint
Backend: Plans endpoint returns correct pricing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Complete pre-launch testing done. All critical flows working: Landing page buttons, Login/Register, Dashboard, Admin Dashboard (all 5 tabs), Billing, API Keys, Pricing, Footer pages. Plans correctly priced at €19/€49/€99/€199. BYOAK system functional. 7-day trial mentioned on pricing page. Application ready for launch at saas.seamanshelp.com.
